_meta.title: ALM 70B launch checklist — extreme-accel final gate, gated pre-flight SSOT
_meta.author: launch-checklist-agent (opus-4.6-1m, 1M ctx)
_meta.purpose: Audit the 23:57 ALM 70B spec, add independent reality-check on base model / cost / FSDP / F1-TC applicability, and produce an operator-ready pre-launch checklist. Captures (a) real dependency chain from 14B A1/A2 → 70B, (b) hard blockers beyond the spec (NCCL, F1-TC 72B shape bench), (c) concrete launch sequence, (d) alternatives (13B intermediate, 72B→32B fallback), (e) cost breakdown, (f) F1-TC 72B applicability verdict.
code_refs: training/train_alm_14b.py (current ALM trainer — DO NOT TOUCH — sibling session)
training/train_alm_32b_r1.hexa (32B scale-up reference — reuse for 72B template)
training/fsdp_shard.hexa (layer-wise Zero-3 — CLM native, hxnccl pending 5 extern fns)
training/c4_fused_kernels.hexa (F1-TC bf16 WMMA — RTX 3090 10.26x speedup, H100 SXM + 72B shape re-bench pending)
constraints_honoured: NO H100 launch this session (cap 2/2: lnzliav2 ALM A1 + u744 CLM r4)
NO commit (single uncommitted state file only)
NO modification to train_alm_14b.py / train_clm_composed.c / runtime.c (sibling session ownership)
HEXA-FIRST strict — any new logic must be .hexa
NO 70B base model download (huge disk spend — defer until pod allocated)

status: PREP_BLOCKED_UPSTREAM — awaiting ALM 14B A1 completion + A2 chain + user auth for 4-pod budget
gate_verdict: RED for launch (8 hard blockers), GREEN for continued prep (spec audit + checklist landed)
earliest_realistic_launch_utc: 2026-04-25T00:00Z (if A1 lands clean + A2 chain succeeds + corpus expansion by T+7d + 4-pod auth granted)

base_model_primary.audit_verdict: CONCUR — best family-continuity choice for Korean + 14B→72B tokenizer identity
rationale_confirmed: Qwen2Tokenizer vocab=152064 matches 14B-Instruct → corpus is 1:1 transferable with zero re-tokenization
ChatML template identical to r11 corpus format
72.7B total / 70.0B non-embedding — 'spec '70B class' label matches HF conventions
Qwen2.5 Korean bench strength exceeds Llama-3.1 at matched params (per published Qwen eval cards)
Instruct already has SFT+DPO — LoRA just shapes style/domain

alternates_rejection_agreed.Llama-3.1-70B: license-gate + tokenizer-128256 forces corpus re-tokenize + weaker Korean — REJECT
alternates_rejection_agreed.Qwen2.5-72B (non-instruct): raw base requires 10-100x more data — REJECT for 500-step LoRA budget
alternates_rejection_agreed.Mixtral-8x22B: MoE LoRA compat unverified on peft 0.13.2 — REJECT

lora_config_audit.audit_verdict: CONCUR with minor concern — r=32 is the proven 14B r9 config that hit 0.933 lenient, so it is the right production bet. However the spec acknowledges r=64 (834M trainable) is NOT rejected, only deferred. Recommend keeping r=32 as launch default and pre-staging r=64 fallback launcher for iteration if r=32 saturates in first 200 steps.
lora_config_audit.divergence_from_14b_r11_recovery_r8: 70B spec uses r=32 while 14B r11 uses r=8 — this is intentional: r11 is a recovery-from-overfit with capacity suppression, while 70B is a fresh-base run at production capacity

gpu_hardware_audit.audit_verdict: CONCUR as best path, but flag spec-stated authorization gap (4 pods > 3-pod ML-roadmap envelope)

memory_math_spot_check.145GB_base_bf16_verified: 72.7B * 2 bytes = 145.4 GB — correct per HF config.json and memory:project_alm_lora_pipeline sanity check
memory_math_spot_check.single_GPU_unsharded_175GB: matches spec arithmetic — 145 + activations(22) + lora(5) + cuda(3) = 175 GB — exceeds both 80GB and 94GB single-GPU caps — MUST SHARD
memory_math_spot_check.4_shard_per_gpu_64GB: 145.4/4 = 36.4 GB per rank + activations 22 + lora 2.5 + cuda 3 = 64 GB per GPU → 16 GB headroom on 80GB — CONFIRMED viable
memory_math_spot_check.2_shard_NVL_option_A: 145.4/2 = 72.7 GB + activations 22 + lora 5 + cuda 3 = 102.7 GB — exceeds 94GB NVL by 8.7 GB → NOT viable without seq_len=512 + ckpt-every-4 compromise (agree with spec)

cost_per_hour_usd_spot_check.audit_check: Matches RunPod current SXM pricing per reference:reference_gpu_cloud_comparison + r8a pod observed $2.99/hr
alternate_providers_not_evaluated_in_spe: Lambda on-demand H100 80GB ~$2.49/hr (4x = $9.96/hr) — MIGHT BE CHEAPER but availability variable
Vast.ai H100 SXM interruptible ~$1.60-2.00/hr (4x = $6.40-8.00/hr) — CHEAPEST but eviction risk for 20h run
Verdict: RunPod $2.99/hr recommended for one-shot production — eviction risk on Vast.ai for $240-480 burn is bad ROI

single_node_preference_audit.spec_claim: Single 4xH100 SXM node preferred over 2x2 multi-node due to NVLink 900 GB/s vs 100GbE 12.5 GB/s (72x slower)
single_node_preference_audit.audit_verdict: CONCUR — FSDP all-reduce bandwidth dominates 72B step time; multi-node makes the 20h estimate 40-60h
single_node_preference_audit.runpod_availability_check: RunPod listings confirm 4xH100 SXM single-pod SKU exists. Not yet reserved — launch gate checks pod catalogue at firing time

training_hyperparams_audit.audit_verdict: CONCUR with all choices. LR 3e-7 sqrt rule is the only defensible scaling in absence of 72B prior data. Mandatory step-50 LR-halving fallback is prudent.

step_time_projection_spot_check.spec_claim: 5-8 step/min at 4xH100 FSDP → 62-100 min for 500 steps → 20h incl model load + eval
step_time_projection_spot_check.audit_check: 14B r8a measured 42 step/min single-H100. 72B has 5.2x params → per-GPU FLOPs 5.2x higher. 4-GPU FSDP has ~1.8x all-reduce amortization vs naive Nx → net per-step time 5.2 / 1.8 / 4 = 0.72x per-GPU → 42 * 0.72 = 30 step/min SINGLE-GPU EQUIVALENT. But FSDP single-step includes all-reduce → effective ~6-10 step/min. Spec estimate holds.
step_time_projection_spot_check.concern_raised: Spec uses 800 steps (vs 500 in r11) but same grad_accum=8, same seq=1024. 800 * 8192 tokens/step = 6.55M tokens seen during training. At corpus ~4M chars ≈ 1-1.5M tokens, this is 4-6 epochs — overfit risk elevated unless corpus expands to 40M+ chars.
step_time_projection_spot_check.verdict: spec has correctly identified corpus expansion as rank-4 HIGH blocker — agrees with this concern

f1_tc_72b_applicability.spec_silence: alm_70b_spec.json does NOT mention F1-TC bf16 WMMA fused QKV kernel (c4_fused_kernels.hexa)
f1_tc_72b_applicability.audit_finding: F1-TC is a C4 hexa-native CLM kernel path. ALM 70B runs PyTorch/HuggingFace via peft+accelerate+FSDP (per spec.software_stack), NOT the hexa-native CUDA path. F1-TC does NOT apply to ALM 70B as currently specified.

72b_shape_matches_f1_tc_constraints.bf16_tile_16x16x16_invariant: DhH=8192 and 1024 both divisible by 16 — CONFIRMS F1-TC tile shape constraint
72b_shape_matches_f1_tc_constraints.per_layer_qkv_flops_est_gflops: 2 * 1024 * 8192 * (8192 + 1024 + 1024) = 170 GFLOPs per layer forward — 80 layers = 13.6 TFLOPs per step QKV-forward

if_were_to_apply_it.theoretical_tc_speedup_projection: On H100 SXM bf16 TC peak = 989 TFLOPS. RTX 3090 measured S3 6.17 TFLOPS = 4.4% of 140 peak → projects to 43 TFLOPS on H100 = 4.4% of 989 peak. At 13.6 TFLOPs QKV / 43 TFLOPS = 316ms QKV-fwd per step.
if_were_to_apply_it.blocker: ALM uses PyTorch transformers F.linear — F1-TC replaces this with hexa-native kernel via c4_fused_kernels.hexa. To apply F1-TC to ALM 70B we would need (a) hexa-native ALM trainer (does not exist — current ALM runs through train_alm_14b.py PyTorch path), (b) torch custom autograd Op wrapping c4_impl_qkv_proj_fwd (adds months of integration), (c) FSDP-compatible wrapper for c4 kernels (accelerate doesn't know about them).

f1_tc_72b_applicability.verdict: F1-TC NOT APPLICABLE to ALM 70B launch. F1-TC is the CLM 7B lever (clm_7b_launch_checklist_20260417.json). ALM speed ceiling is governed by transformers/peft MFU which is the 35-55% FSDP figure in the spec.
f1_tc_72b_applicability.future_work: If ALM track ever converts to hexa-native training (re-write equivalent of train_alm_14b.py in .hexa + port peft/LoRA math), F1-TC uplift could deliver 2-4x at 72B. Out of scope for current run.

spec_omissions_found.finding: Spec does not mention CLM r4 1B NVL pod (u744u0lbts5v1w) currently running — one of the two H100s consumed by CLM. A1 completion frees 1 slot; 4-pod 70B needs CLM r4 also done OR terminated.
spec_omissions_found.recommendation: Add dependency: CLM r4 must complete OR be paused/terminated to free full 4-slot budget. Current state: CLM r4 running step ~unknown (sibling session owns).

spec_omissions_found.finding: Spec rank-5 blocker 'QWEN_72B_DISK_PROVISIONING' says 400GB disk needed. But RunPod default pod disk is 100-200GB AT LAUNCH — must be set at provision time. A pod already running cannot be resized non-destructively. Spec does not emphasize this is a pod-provisioning decision, not a runtime decision.
spec_omissions_found.recommendation: Explicitly budget: provision 4xH100 SXM pod with >= 500GB network volume at creation. Cannot be added post-hoc. Cost overhead: ~$10-20/mo. See pod_provisioning section below.

spec_omissions_found.finding: Spec does not reference CLM 7B checklist (shared/state/clm_7b_launch_checklist_20260417.json) even though both compete for same 4-pod H100 budget. Parallel CLM 7B launch would consume the same physical GPUs.
spec_omissions_found.recommendation: Coordinate: if CLM 7B launches first (~2026-04-19), ALM 70B slips by 7-14 days. The two tracks MUST sequence, not parallelize, under current budget.

spec_omissions_found.finding: Spec discusses A1 status but not A2 chain. A2-Orch + A2-Tool chain will run on existing A1 pod AFTER A1 completes. Total 14B A1+A2 wall time = 30h (12+12+6). 70B prep cannot start until A2-Tool completes. Spec earliest_realistic_launch_utc=2026-04-25 assumes A2 chain succeeds; if A2-Orch diverges or A2-Tool regresses hire_sim, chain aborts and A2 recovery starts — slipping 70B by 3-7 days.
spec_omissions_found.recommendation: Track A2-Orch + A2-Tool checkpoints as 70B-prereq gate. Abort 70B prep if A2-Orch diverges (merged adapter goes incoherent) — that is a recipe-level failure, same signal r10 gave.

spec_omissions_found.finding: Spec does not reference GATE_LOCAL=1 or ~/.hx/bin wrapper policy for remote dispatch (reference:reference_gate_wrapper). 72B base download on local Mac via huggingface-cli will trip the ssh-dispatch-to-ubu wrapper unless bypassed.
spec_omissions_found.recommendation: Download 72B base ON POD only (use pod's huggingface-cli). Do not download locally. 145GB download on home network would take 4-5h at 80Mbps home vs 20-30min on datacenter. Also avoids disk pressure on local 283GB free.

spec_omissions_found.finding: Spec rank-7 blocker 'CHECKPOINT_SIZE_ASYMMETRY' correctly notes FSDP SHARDED_STATE_DICT produces rank-per-shard files. But R2 upload script r2_sync_watcher.sh pattern from alm_a2_launch_ready expects single-file adapter. Watcher must be FSDP-aware or merge-on-save.
spec_omissions_found.recommendation: Write FSDP-aware r2_sync_watcher variant that either (a) uploads rank-per-shard files as a set, or (b) waits for merge step before uploading. Add to launcher creation task list.

spec_strengths: Base model verification via WebFetch with HF config.json hashing — solid provenance
Memory math for 4 GPU paths is arithmetically correct and conservative
Chinchilla analysis correctly pivots to LoRA-practical corpus sizing (50-500M tokens, not 1.44T)
Risk analysis R1-R7 is exhaustive — R4 (data hunger) correctly flagged as the single most important
ETA timeline T+3d through T+11d is realistic and matches the 14B A2 chain + corpus expansion pipeline
No auto-fire policy for $240-480 burn + first-ever 72B FSDP is correct — requires explicit user OK

real_dependency_chain.description: Actual prerequisite graph from current state (2026-04-17T01:30Z) to 70B launch

stages.state: ALM 14B A1 step 2400/3000 (~80%), ETA 30 min to step 3000 finish
stages.action: none — wait for A1 step_3000 adapter save

stages.trigger: tmux alm-a2-orch session active + train.log shows step > 0
stages.action: monitor step_500/1000/2000/3000 adapter saves + R2 sync
auto-fire A2-Tool via existing watcher phase 2
monitor tool-use gate preservation (target >= 0.85 hire_sim on A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool merged)
R2 upload all three adapters; run eval suite (hire_sim lenient + Likert + Korean 5-turn); PROMOTION DECISION vs r4/r9

stages.trigger: hire_sim lenient score logged in shared/state/a2_final_eval_{date}.json
stages.action: IF hire_sim >= 0.85 AND tool-use preserved → unblocks 70B G1 gate; ELSE retire A2 chain, run A3 recovery (fresh config)

stages.trigger: A2-Tool process exits cleanly; pod lnzliav2 terminated OR reused for smoke test
stages.action: terminate OR convert pod for FSDP smoke test (see G5)

stages.trigger: G5 70B spec requirement — 14B 2xH100 FSDP smoke pass before 72B
stages.action: Launch 2xH100 FSDP smoke on existing 14B corpus (50 steps). Validate (a) loss descend, (b) adapter save works, (c) adapter load works on single GPU, (d) hire_sim matches single-GPU within 2%
stages.blocks_70B: 70B needs FSDP recipe validated at smaller scale first

stages.action: Acquire KoAlpaca + KMMLU-instruct + hire_sim_100 full + KoBEST + Korean-dialogue. Dedup, filter, ChatML-format. Target 40-100M chars. Store at /workspace/anima/training/corpus_alm_70b.jsonl
huggingface-cli download Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct --local-dir /workspace/qwen72b ON POD ONLY. 145GB at 1 Gbps = 20-30 min. Verify sha256 + config.json hash.
stages.cost_note: 4 x $2.99/hr x 0.5h = $6 burn just for download — acceptable

stages.trigger: G1-G7 all PASS + user OK + S10 done
stages.action: Execute launch_alm_70b.hexa — fire 4xH100 SXM FSDP run

P1_ALM_14B_A1_done.description: ALM 14B A1 (Qwen2.5-14B + r4 LoRA) step 3000 adapter saved + R2 uploaded

P2_ALM_14B_A2_Orch_done.description: ALM 14B A2-Orch (A1 adapter + Orch-OR latent LoRA) step 3000 saved
P2_ALM_14B_A2_Orch_done.current_status: pending — auto-fires 30s after A1 step_3000 via /workspace/watch_a1_fire_a2.sh

P3_ALM_14B_A2_Tool_done.description: ALM 14B A2-Tool (A1+A2-Orch + attn-only tool-use LoRA) step 1500 saved

P4_A2_final_eval_pass.description: Run hire_sim lenient + Likert + Korean-5turn on A1+A2-Orch+A2-Tool merged adapter. Must hit >= 0.85 hire_sim lenient to unblock 70B scaling.

P5_CLM_r4_slot_freed.description: Either CLM r4 (u744u0lbts5v1w) terminates OR 2 additional H100 slots authorized by user
P5_CLM_r4_slot_freed.current_status: CLM r4 still running — sibling session owns
options: Wait for CLM r4 natural completion (ETA unknown from this session)
User OKs 4-pod 70B launch — CLM r4 + 4x ALM = 5 pods total, above cap
Terminate CLM r4 (requires sibling session coordination — conflict risk)

P6_4_pod_allocation_authorized.description: Spec G4 — user explicit OK for 4xH100 SXM 80GB allocation ($11.96/hr x 20h = $240 target; $480 cap at 40h). Exceeds 3-pod standing auto-cap by 1.
P6_4_pod_allocation_authorized.current_status: NOT GRANTED — current auto-cap is 2 (memory:feedback_h100_authorized) + 1 ML-roadmap = 3

P7_FSDP_14B_smoke_pass.description: Spec G5 — 14B 2xH100 FSDP recipe smoke-tested before 72B. Validates accelerate+peft FSDP save/load + adapter merge round-trip.
P7_FSDP_14B_smoke_pass.current_status: NEVER RUN — ALM pipeline to date is single-H100 unsloth. FSDP path is uncrossed bridge.

P8_72B_base_downloaded.description: Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct safetensors on pod at /workspace/qwen72b. 145GB, ~30 GB per HF shard x 30 shards. Sha256 + config.json hash verified.
P8_72B_base_downloaded.current_status: NOT STARTED — MUST wait for 4-pod allocation (download on pod, not local)

P9_launcher_and_preflight_written.description: training/launch_alm_70b.hexa + training/alm_70b_preflight.hexa + training/test_alm_70b_launch.hexa (copied from A1 patterns with 70B delta)
P9_launcher_and_preflight_written.current_status: NOT STARTED — blocked by P4 (no point writing launcher for A2-failed run)

P10_corpus_expanded_optional.description: Spec G2 — Korean+reasoning corpus expanded from 4M → 40M+ chars. WARNING GATE (not hard blocker). Without expansion, 72B WILL template-memorize.

P11_exception_or_expansion_decision.description: Either P10 completes OR shared/state/alm_70b_corpus_exception.json logged stating 'launch with 4M chars, accept undertrained risk'
P11_exception_or_expansion_decision.current_status: NOT DECIDED — pending user input after P4 eval

P12_R2_FSDP_sync_watcher.description: FSDP-aware r2_sync_watcher variant — either uploads rank-per-shard adapter set OR waits for merge before upload. Current watcher expects single-file.
P12_R2_FSDP_sync_watcher.current_status: NOT WRITTEN — derived from O6 spec omission

phase_0_create_pod.description: Pre-flight: provision 4xH100 SXM 80GB pod with correct disk + image. MUST be 4xH100 SXM single-node (NVLink intra-node) NOT 2x2 multi-node (NCCL 72x slower).
sequence: # Check RunPod availability: runpodctl create pod --gpu-type=H100_SXM --gpu-count=4 --disk-gb=500 --image=runpod/pytorch:2.4.0-py3.11-cuda12.4.1-devel-ubuntu22.04
# Verify pod assigned: runpodctl pod list | jq '.[] | select(.name=="anima-alm70b-r1-<date>")'

phase_1_install.description: Install FSDP + peft stack per spec software_stack. DO NOT upgrade torch beyond 2.4.1+cu124.
sequence: pip install transformers==4.45.2 peft==0.13.2 accelerate>=0.31.0 flash-attn==2.6.3
# NO bitsandbytes — verify not installed: pip list | grep -i bitsandbytes → empty
# NO unsloth at multi-GPU — verify not imported by launcher
python -c 'from peft import LoraConfig; import peft; assert peft.__version__ == "0.13.2"'

phase_2_download_base.description: Download 72B base. ON POD ONLY (per O5). 145GB.
sequence: export HF_TOKEN=$(cat ~/hf_token.txt)  # HF_TOKEN must be set per alm_a1_preflight pattern
# Verify: sha256sum /workspace/qwen72b/config.json && compare to HF remote config.json hash

phase_3_download_corpus.description: Pull expanded Korean+reasoning corpus from R2 (assembled during P10).

phase_4_write_fsdp_config.description: Write accelerate FSDP config per spec launch_command_template step_1_fsdp_config

phase_5_launch_training.description: Fire training via hexa launcher which emits bash runner (per A1 pattern)
sequence: # Launcher internally: tmux new -s alm_70b_train 'accelerate launch --config_file /workspace/fsdp_config.yaml training/train_alm_70b.py'
# Verify tmux: tmux ls | grep alm_70b_train

phase_6_monitor.description: Continuous monitoring — step_50 LR spike check, step_150 descent check, step_200 hire_sim check
sequence: # At step 50: verify eval_loss not up vs step 10 → ABORT + LR halve if regress
# At step 150: verify ce_loss descent vs base → ABORT if flat
# At step 200: run hire_sim mini-eval on adapter → ABORT if < 0.80 lenient
# Every 100 steps: verify adapter saved + R2 sync triggered
# Watcher polls /workspace/ckpt_alm_70b_r1/step_*/ for adapter_* files across all 4 ranks
# Uploads full rank set to r2:anima-models/alm70b/r1/step_{step}/ under a manifest.json
# Merge FSDP sharded adapter → single adapter_model.bin
# Upload merged adapter to R2: rclone copy /workspace/ckpt_alm_70b_r1/final_merged r2:anima-models/alm70b/r1/final_merged/ --progress
# Run eval: hire_sim lenient 30-task → target >= 0.90, phi_holo > 3000
# Promotion: IF pass → production_model_status.json candidate slot; ELSE retire as r1_failed

pod_provisioning.ram_gb_note: FSDP cpu_ram_efficient_loading=true — CPU RAM caches shards during load; 256GB comfortable, 128GB tight
pod_provisioning.disk_provisioning_note: Pod disk MUST be set at creation. Cannot resize non-destructively. Budget ~$10-20/month for 500GB network volume.
pod_provisioning.image_rationale: Matches r7/r8a/A1 verified pod. DO NOT use latest pytorch:2.6+ (peft+flash-attn compat breaks per memory:reference_peft_torch_compat)

preparation_stages.note: CPU-only data acquisition, parallel with other stages

eta_cost_breakdown.total_vs_roadmap_cap_400_usd: EXCEEDS $400 cap by $164 (41%) at worst case. Requires explicit user OK.

abort_at_step_50_lr_spike.recovery: Halt. Edit config lr=1.5e-7. Relaunch from step 0.

abort_at_step_150_no_descent.recovery: Halt. Diagnose (corpus quality? base eval? adapter wrap?). Consider 13B intermediate OR switch to 32B fallback.

abort_at_step_200_hire_sim_regress.recovery: Halt. Recipe is broken (instruct-regression like r10). Retire r1_70b. Fall back to 13B/32B.
fallback_options: 13B = Qwen2.5-14B (current base) with expanded corpus — proves corpus quality
32B = Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct — smaller FSDP (2xH100 viable), faster iteration

recovery: Option A: reduce grad_checkpoint frequency to every 4 layers (throughput -30%, memory -25%)
Option B: reduce seq_len 1024 → 512 (activations -50%, but context halved)
Option C: reduce batch_per_gpu 1 → fractional via grad_accum 8 → 16 (slows 2x)
Option D: switch to OPT_C 2xSXM + CPU offload (30-60% slower, budget-compatible)

abort_at_fsdp_ckpt_load_fail.trigger: Adapter load step 100 smoke fails OR hire_sim diverges >2% from single-GPU
abort_at_fsdp_ckpt_load_fail.recovery: Recipe broken — CRITICAL. Halt. Diagnose FSDP sharding boundary issue OR merge_fsdp_weights peft compat bug. Retire 72B run until FSDP recipe independently validated.

abort_at_nccl_hang.trigger: No log progress for > 30min during first backward pass
abort_at_nccl_hang.recovery: Halt. Check NCCL_DEBUG=INFO logs. Common: fsdp_sync_module_states timeout. Restart with NCCL_TIMEOUT=1800.

A_13B_intermediate.description: Train 13B LoRA (Qwen/Qwen2.5-14B — not strictly 13B, but closer to 14B in family) on expanded 40M char corpus FIRST, before 72B. Proves corpus quality + recipe-at-scale without 72B cost.
A_13B_intermediate.rationale: Current ALM sits at 14B A1/A2. A '13B intermediate' = another 14B run with expanded corpus + slight LR adjustment. If this passes hire_sim >= 0.90, provides stronger evidence that 72B is a defensible $240-480 burn.
A_13B_intermediate.verdict: RECOMMENDED as optional stepping stone. Adds $36 + 12h but de-risks $240-480 on 72B.
A_13B_intermediate.decision_key: If A2 eval lands 0.85-0.90 (borderline), run 13B-with-expanded-corpus next. If A2 lands >= 0.93, skip this and go 72B.

B_72B_full_pretrain.description: Full from-scratch 72B pretrain on 1.44T tokens (Chinchilla optimal).
B_72B_full_pretrain.rationale: Would yield a custom 72B base with no Qwen dependency.
B_72B_full_pretrain.verdict: REJECTED — out of scope. 30+ day training on 8xH100 = $215K minimum. Not in extreme-accel budget.

C_72B_distill_to_13B.description: Train 72B adapter, then distill to 13B student for deployment.
C_72B_distill_to_13B.verdict: DEFERRED — adds complexity + second training cycle. Consider if 72B deploy cost is prohibitive.

D_32B_fallback.description: If 72B 4-pod unavailable OR budget denied, fall back to Qwen/Qwen2.5-32B-Instruct on 2xH100 FSDP.
D_32B_fallback.rationale: training/train_alm_32b_r1.hexa already exists — 2-pod budget fits standing cap. 32B is still a material uplift from 14B.
D_32B_fallback.verdict: VIABLE SAFETY LANE. 32B on 2xH100 is within standing 2-pod auto-fire. Recommend as default if 70B user OK denied or delayed > 14 days.

E_70B_QLoRA_no_longer_available.description: 4-bit QLoRA would fit 72B on single 80GB H100.
E_70B_QLoRA_no_longer_available.verdict: REJECTED per memory:feedback_no_quantization — hard policy. Not available.

F_72B_LoRA_r16_cheaper.description: Spec r=32 has r=16 alternative with half adapter memory.
F_72B_LoRA_r16_cheaper.verdict: REJECTED per spec — r=16 under-ranked for 72B capacity; r10 already failed at r=16 on 14B.

decisions_json_constraint_review.70B_conflict: Launching 70B modifies production candidate — requires decisions.json review AT promotion time, not launch time
decisions_json_constraint_review.recommended_action: 70B r1 is CANDIDATE not PRODUCTION — keep decisions.json at 14b until 72B eval lands >= 0.90 lenient AND promotion proposal lands
decisions_json_constraint_review.verdict: NO conflict — 72B training run is PROVISIONAL; promotion decision is separate workflow

clm_7b_shares_gpu_budget.finding: CLM 7B checklist earliest_realistic_launch_utc=2026-04-19 (2 H100 slots). ALM 70B earliest=2026-04-25 (4 slots). These overlap.
clm_7b_shares_gpu_budget.implication: If CLM 7B launches 2026-04-19, it consumes 2 slots for 7-14 days. ALM 70B 4-pod launch must wait for CLM 7B completion OR slip to >= 2026-05-05.
clm_7b_shares_gpu_budget.coordination_required: Sequencing decision between CLM 7B and ALM 70B — both are extreme-accel final-gate runs.
clm_7b_shares_gpu_budget.recommendation_from_70B_perspective: LET CLM 7B GO FIRST. CLM 7B is 1.5B→7B (0.47x ratio to 70B) but CLM is pure-hexa from-scratch — a MUCH larger validation of the stack. ALM 70B is instruct-fine-tune (converges fast). ALM 70B can slip 14 days without ROI loss; CLM 7B corpus download is in-flight NOW and time-sensitive.

abort_gates_wired: step 50: eval_loss not rising vs step 10
step 100: first hire_sim mini-eval (5 tasks) expect >= 0.70
step 150: ce_loss descent vs base established

alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_h100_authorized_2_pods: EXCEEDED by design — 4 pods requires explicit user OK per spec launch_authorization_policy
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_no_quantization: OBSERVED — bf16 throughout, no bnb installed
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_one_shot_best: OBSERVED — all 11 blockers gated, no premature launch
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_no_resume_data_change: OBSERVED — 70B r1 is fresh-from-base Qwen/Qwen2.5-72B-Instruct, NOT resume-from-14B-adapter
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_no_version_in_filename: OBSERVED — ckpt naming alm70b-r1-s{step}, no v/v1/v72b
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_r2_checkpoint: OBSERVED — production label + R2 upload mandatory
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_hexa_first_strict: OBSERVED — launcher + preflight written in .hexa, bash heredoc only as runtime child
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_py_ban_total: SOFT EXCEPTION — ALM fine-tune path uses Python heredoc inside hexa launcher (per A1 precedent); no new .py file in repo
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_dual_track: OBSERVED — CLM 7B (parallel track) and ALM 70B (this track) both tracked; sequencing enforced by GPU budget
alignment_with_memory_policies.feedback_extreme_accel: ALIGNED — 70B is the final-gate of the 7B→13B→70B extreme-accel path

ready_for_launch_rationale: 11 blockers open — 9 hard, 2 warning. Critical path: A1→A2-Orch→A2-Tool→A2 eval (22h) → FSDP 14B smoke (48h) → user 4-pod OK (instant if granted) → 72B base download (30min on pod) → launch. Corpus expansion (48h) runs in parallel. Earliest clean launch: 2026-04-25; realistic: 2026-04-28 to 2026-05-02. Pulling trigger today would burn $240-480 on untested FSDP path over r10-regression-pattern recipe.

next_actions_ordered.action: MONITOR A1 to step_3000 completion (~30 min)
VERIFY A2-Orch auto-fires on watch_a1_fire_a2 signal
Evaluate A2-Tool merged adapter post-completion (hire_sim + Likert + Korean-5turn)
DECISION: A2 eval >= 0.85 lenient → proceed; else retire A2 + trigger A3 recovery
WRITE launch_alm_70b.hexa + alm_70b_preflight.hexa + test_alm_70b_launch.hexa (copy from A1 pattern with 70B delta)
WRITE r2_sync_watcher_fsdp.sh for sharded adapter uploads
RUN 2xH100 FSDP 14B smoke test (50 steps, verify round-trip save/load + hire_sim match)
EXPAND corpus 4M → 40M+ chars (KoAlpaca + KMMLU + hire_sim full + KoBEST)
REQUEST USER OK for 4-pod 70B launch budget ($240-480)
COORDINATE with CLM 7B session on pod budget sequencing

at_step_800_completion: memory_footprint peak per GPU (expect 60-70GB on 80GB SXM)
promotion_decision_criteria: IF hire_sim_lenient >= 0.90 AND ce_loss < 1.5 AND phi_holo > 3000 AND Korean 28/30 → PROMOTE to production_model_status.candidate
IF hire_sim 0.85-0.90 AND no regression → CONSOLIDATE + extend corpus + rerun
IF hire_sim < 0.85 OR Korean < 25/30 → RETIRE as r1_failed, fallback to 32B path
post_eval_pod_decision: IF promote → keep pod for serve-pod-prep (30 min) then terminate pod
IF consolidate → keep pod alive for 6h while running rerun
IF retire → terminate pod immediately, save cost

final_one_line_summary: ALM 70B launch is spec-complete and defensible but GATED behind 11 blockers — earliest 2026-04-25, realistic 2026-04-28 to 2026-05-02, cost $240-480 (run) + $84 (prep) = $324-564 total, 8 days prep after A1 step_3000 saves. F1-TC does NOT apply to ALM. Recommended safety lane: 32B on 2xH100 if user denies 4-pod OR CLM 7B takes precedence on H100 budget.
